title: MetaFast modification for key k-mers extraction based on Latent Dirichlet Allocation
author: Vladimir Popov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Key k-mers-based MetaFast modification for feature extraction from groups of metagenomic samples. Developed as part of the work on the thesis titled "Feature extraction based on de Bruijn graphs for metagenomic samples classification"'.
steps_raw: Key k-mers-based MetaFast modification for feature extraction from groups of metagenomic samples. Developed as part of the work on the thesis titled "Feature extraction based on de Bruijn graphs for metagenomic samples classification"'.
